blocks.text: Store channels separate the workdir root from the user workspace root.

rows: C11 app data root + C6 materialization
Created inside app container, package local data, or app group
C6, constrained by C11 path selection
Arbitrary home scan is forbidden in Store channels

items: macOS App Store requires a security-scoped bookmark or app group/container grant.
Windows MSIX requires package identity and user-selected folder grant.
The current `dev-local` Application Support path cannot be shipped as a Store artifact.
Provider cwd remains `workdir/`; selected workspace content is materialized by snapshot, worktree, or shallow clone during prepare.
C6 materializes a user workspace root only when both active grant and `ConsentLedger.workspace-access:<workspace-id>` are true.
